meaning: n.马德拉斯布(一种薄棉布),一种结实耐用的丝绸
examples: We were together only during the few days the steamer took from Calcutta to Madras.
He was a poor student from Madras whose genius took him to Stanford.
We befriended a group of Indians from Madras. "See you at the top!" we joked.
Madras has witnessed four successive international fixtures since 2003 being disrupted in some way by rain.
Age 23: Goes door to door in city of Madras looking for a job of clerk.
